examples: When they were the same subspecies, the development of big grain varieties was slower than the small, and finally the dry weight of caryopsis was heavier;
Anthocyanidin firstly pigmentizes at the part of caryopsis away from embryo, then gradually extends to the part near embryo and makes the whole pericarp pigmentized.
The caryopsis growth and endosperm development of colored rice were basically the same as conventional rice, with the exception in its anthocyanidin accumulation in the pericarp.
